scopeStatus: Task 7 added producer scripts and fixtures only; no release artifact or signing identity entered Git.
compatStatus: Packaging consumes exact Vulpra products from a copied stage and preserves the unsigned archive; iOS 15 ptrace and private entitlement paths are explicit.
